# Copilot Instructions for AI Coding Agents

## Agent Convention Files — MANDATORY

Before acting on ANY user request, you MUST read these files in order:

1. `AGENTS.md` — base agent guidelines
2. `AGENTS.local.md` — project-specific overrides (if it exists); its rules take precedence over `AGENTS.md`

**IMPORTANT:** Read both files in **full** — do NOT use a line limit. Critical rules (e.g., Skills-First Workflow, MCP priority) appear after the first section and will be missed if truncated.
